Bridgr Bridge the gap

A collection of thoughtfully crafted digital tools — born from real clinical problems, built with purpose, and designed for the people who need them most.

Explore Products The Story

Dr. Sunil Mulgund

Pediatrician & Neonatologist · Karnataka

—MBBS, MD Pediatrics & Neonatology (RGUHS Karnataka, Gold Medalist)
—DNB — Pediatrics & Neonatology
—NNF Fellowship — NICU Specialist
The Story

Clinician.
Intentional builder.

Medicine chose me — but technology always felt like home. I was drawn to computers, to building things, to the quiet satisfaction of solving a problem well. That curiosity never left.

As a Pediatrician and Neonatologist, I found myself surrounded by gaps — small inefficiencies, missing tools, workflows that simply didn't work. I reached out to software developers to help build solutions. What followed was frustrating — it was nearly impossible to find someone who could truly understand a clinical problem deeply enough to solve it properly.

I have never written a line of code. No computer science background, no developer training — just a lifelong fascination with technology and a deep desire to build things. AI made that possible. It gave me the power to finally create what I had always imagined. That is what Bridgr is — real problems, real solutions, built by someone who simply refused to wait for someone else to build them.

Products

Tools built from
real problems.

Each product started as a gap I noticed in my own practice. Here's what's been built so far.

Clinical Reference
Medshelf

Helps medical students organise study materials — PDFs, notes, images, and videos — by specialty and topic. Scans your device to find scattered medical files, imports them in bulk, and keeps everything in one clean offline library.

Open App
Hospital Management
CureDesk HMS

A modern, offline-first Hospital Management System for Indian OPD clinics — covering reception, pharmacy, lab, billing, and analytics in one place. Prints bilingual OPD slips in English + Kannada, with all data staying securely on your own computer.

Open App
Pediatric Tools
Pediaid

A fast, offline-friendly clinical reference app built for paediatricians, neonatologists, registrars and nurses — putting trusted bedside tools and decision support in one place.

Open App
Ward Management
Wardly

A real-time clinical notes app that gives every doctor and nurse on a ward one shared live feed for patient updates — no more lost WhatsApp messages or paper handovers. Post a note, the whole team sees it instantly, with every acknowledgement on record.

Open App
✦

More in the works

New tools are being designed and built. The gap never stops appearing — and neither does the building.
